introSection: Family Inverted Coaster (Chinese: 大洋历险) is a steel inverted roller coaster located at Happy Valley in Songjiang, Shanghai, China. It is the first family roller coaster to be built by Bolliger & Mabillard.

sections.title: Etymology
sections.content: The Chinese name "大洋历险" translates as "Ocean Adventures", but the English name is simply "Family Inverted Coaster".

fullText:
Family Inverted Coaster (Chinese: 大洋历险) is a steel inverted roller coaster located at Happy Valley in Songjiang, Shanghai, China. It is the first family roller coaster to be built by Bolliger & Mabillard.

Blue track and white supports.



The Chinese name "大洋历险" translates as "Ocean Adventures", but the English name is simply "Family Inverted Coaster".
